name: This twist on bagels and lox gets a

source.cookbook: The Best of Fine Cooking: Breakfast
source.author: Fine Cooking

intro: flavor boost from orange zest and

ingredients.item: firm-ripe medium avocados, cut into medium dice
chopped fresh cilantro; whole leaves for garnish
Tbs. plus 2 tsp. fresh lime juice
thinly sliced cold-smoked salmon, cut into 11/2-inch-wide strips
long and 1/2 inch thick), toasted very crisp

method: In a large bowl, gently mix (don’t mash) the avocado, scallion, chopped cilantro, lime juice, jalapeño, and 1/2 tsp. salt. in another medium bowl, mix the oil, coriander, and orange zest. Toss the salmon with the oil mixtur e.

Rub the toasts lightly with the cut sides of the garlic clove. Portion the avocado mixture among the toasts. Pile the salmon strips on top. garnish with the cilantro leaves and serve immedia tely so the toast stays crisp. open-faced smoked salmon and avocado sandwiches
